name: Avoidance of 200% Penalty via Timely Correction

eligibility.description: Disqualified persons (substantial influencers) who received an economic benefit from a tax-exempt organization exceeding the value of services provided.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Disqualified persons can avoid the 200% second-tier tax by 'correcting' the excess benefit transaction (undoing the benefit and restoring the organization's financial position) before a notice of deficiency is mailed.
